'''The Broken Tusk''' was a dining establishment on [[Reuss VIII/Legends|Reuss VIII]] owned and operated by the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] brothers [[Greel]] and [[Gorge]]. Its main attraction was the [[Dool Arena]], a dueling pit sunk into the floor.<ref name="wrsv">''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]''</ref>
